name: android-app-helper
title: Android App Helper
description: Common Android device utilities: copy/open predefined URLs, logcat, and app listing.
author: striker_lulu

commands.name: copy-match-urls
commands.title: Copy Match Urls
commands.description: Copy Chrome tab URLs that include the configured match string

commands.name: open-match-urls
commands.title: Open Match Urls
commands.description: Open Chrome tab URLs that include the configured match string in the default browser

commands.name: frida-apps
commands.title: Android App List
commands.description: List Android apps (uses Frida when available to show app names)

preferences.name: outputDirectory
preferences.title: Output Directory
preferences.description: Directory to save extracted APKs and files

preferences.name: adbPath
preferences.title: ADB Path
preferences.description: Path to ADB executable (leave empty to use ADB from PATH)

preferences.name: fridaBinPath
preferences.title: Frida Binaries Path
preferences.description: Path to directory containing frida and frida-ps binaries (leave empty to use from PATH)

preferences.name: autoExtractTimeout
preferences.title: Extraction Timeout (seconds)
preferences.description: Timeout for automatic APK extraction operations

preferences.name: copyMatch
preferences.title: Copy match string
preferences.description: Domain or substring to match in Chrome tab URLs (e.g., screenshot.googleplex.com)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
